TC diario OFICIAL.message: Your given address (https://login.microsoftonline.com/) should consist of an https url with hostname and a minimum of one segment in a path: e.g. https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant} or https://{tenant_name}.ciamlogin.com/{tenant} or https://{tenant_name}.b2clogin.com/{tenant_name}.onmicrosoft.com/policy
